productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Kids Boys Grey Printed T-shirt
description: Composition Grey round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach or iron on print Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed This united colors of benetton T-shirt is designed to make your little bundle of mischief look cute, while he stays comfortable all day in the soft cotton fabric. Pair it with a denim pants and floaters for unbridled comfort.
